A.text: The North Pacific is mostly warming, while the South Pacific is mostly cooling.

B.text: Both the North and South Pacific are mostly warming.

C.text: Both the North and South Pacific are mostly unchanged.

D.text: The North Pacific is mostly unchanged or cooling, while the South Pacific is mostly warming.

parsed.answer_value: Both the North and South Pacific are mostly warming.
parsed.rationale: The map shows a predominance of warm colors (yellow to red) across both the North and South Pacific, indicating a warming trend in sea surface temperatures over the past week.
